<!--
For changes that span subsystems, touch the Regional Capability Layer,
modify a trait public to other crates, or affect security-critical paths,
an RFC will be required. This issue is for pre-discussion of the idea.
-->

<!-- What user need or technical limitation are you addressing? -->

## Affected pillars / variants

- [ ] India sovereignty
- [ ] Retail / fleet revival
- [ ] Embedded / IoT
- [ ] Cross-cutting (specify)

If this feature was deferred from an existing spec's "Non-Goals" section,
link the spec and section here. The spec will be updated in lockstep with
